svg.title: Wi-Fi Proxmox Talos GPU worker architecture
svg.desc: Git and Omni define a Talos worker request. A Proxmox provider on the management NUC creates a VM on the Dell host, attaches the mapped GTX 1050 Ti, and the worker joins the existing cluster through the ASUS media bridge.
